creator: ps.ports@smyrak.com
text:
FWIW, I have been using the patch locally on various machines without issues. 

I also realized that this is not the only port affected by this symptom and there are 15 other ports having similar patches:

audio/re
devel/electron32
devel/electron33
devel/electron34
devel/electron35
graphics/igt-gpu-tools
graphics/libdrm
sysutils/bacula13-server
sysutils/bacula15-server
textproc/mifluz
www/chromium
www/iridium
www/qt6-webengine
www/ungoogled-chromium
x11/virglrenderer
